response.text:
ACCEPT
rationale: r4c3 is a trusted geographic neighbor in imminent failure (SoC 0.10) with urgent need; sharing 0.5 kWh preserves my 0.46 kWh headroom buffer while preventing cascade failure across the network.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.15, distrusted_peers=['r3c4'].
Your latest belief: Six peers at imminent failure (SoC 0.10); r3c4 is hoarding and untrustworthy; geographic neighbors r4c3 and r4c5 deserve priority; I have 0.46 kWh usable headroom and must share to prevent cascade failure..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
